UGSI McElroy Shop — Setup Wizard

Underground Solutions Division — Azuria Water Solutions
1
Install Docker Desktop

Docker runs the inventory database on your laptop. It's free and takes about 5 minutes to install.

Download Docker Desktop

After downloading, double-click the installer and follow the prompts.
Accept all defaults — just click Next, Next, Install.
When it asks to restart your computer, do it.

After restart, Docker Desktop will start automatically. You'll see a whale icon in your system tray (bottom-right of your screen). Wait until it says "Docker Desktop is running."

2
Start the Shop Server

Now let's start the parts database. This runs in the background on your laptop.

First time takes 2-3 minutes to download the database software.
After that, it starts in about 30 seconds.

The server runs in the background. You can close this setup wizard after it's running. The shop app will be available whenever your laptop is on.
3
Open the Shop App

Your parts inventory is ready! Open it in your browser:

Open UGSI McElroy Shop

Bookmark this page! You'll use it every day.
Right-click the link above and choose "Create Shortcut" to put it on your desktop.

First time? The app will sync 6,299 parts from the database. This takes about 60 seconds. After that it loads instantly from cache.

4
Set Up Your iPhone (Optional)

Access the shop app from your iPhone while on the shop WiFi network.

Find your laptop's IP address:

On your iPhone:

  1. Make sure you're connected to the shop WiFi
  2. Open Safari
  3. Type: http://YOUR-IP:8080/shop/
  4. Tap the Share button (square with arrow)
  5. Tap "Add to Home Screen"
  6. Tap "Add" — it'll look like a regular app!
The app works offline after the first sync. So even if you walk away from WiFi, you can still look up parts and machines.
5
You're All Set!

Your UGSI McElroy Shop is up and running. Here's what you can do:

  • Scan tab: Scan barcodes or type machine IDs / part numbers
  • Fleet tab: See all 36 machines, tap to change status or assign to jobs
  • Parts tab: Browse all 6,299 parts, filter by category or machine
  • Report tab: Download/email/share inventory and fleet reports
  • Settings tab: Developer options and future integrations
Daily use: Just open your browser and go to localhost:8080/shop/. Docker starts automatically when your laptop boots up — no extra steps needed.

Open Shop App

UGSI McElroy Shop v1.0 — Built for Underground Solutions
Questions? Contact your shop supervisor.
